dialog.title: Onboarding Wizard
dialog.description: Complete the setup process to get started with Thunderbolt

privacy.title: Welcome to <bold>Thunderbolt</bold>!
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy-first AI assistant
privacy.zeroLogsDescription: We don't keep logs of your conversations.
privacy.zeroTrainingDescription: We don't train models on your data.
privacy.localStorageDescription: Data is stored securely on your device.
privacy.agreement: I agree to the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink>.

auth.descriptionGoogle: Your assistant can help you manage your email and calendar.
auth.descriptionMicrosoft: Your assistant can help you manage your email, calendar, and documents.
auth.calendarDescriptionGoogle: View your schedule and upcoming events.
auth.calendarDescriptionMicrosoft: View and manage your schedule; create + reschedule events.
auth.emailDescriptionGoogle: Read your emails and compose drafts.
auth.emailDescriptionMicrosoft: Read, compose, and organize your emails.
auth.oneDriveDescription: Search and work with your OneDrive files and documents.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.description: Your AI assistant will use this name to address you personally.

location.title: Where are you located?
location.description: This helps us personalize your experience with local settings and features.
location.selectFromDropdown: Please select a location from the dropdown to get coordinates.
